title: agrostis truncatula subsp. durieui
intro: Agrostis truncatula subsp. durieui is a subspecies of the Agrostis truncatula plant, a type of grass native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and inflammation, due to its antispasmodic, expectorant, and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Agrostis truncatula subsp. durieui include relief from coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as reduced inflammation and improved respiratory function. Traditionally, it is prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, and sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
